---
name: Idea Submission
about: Propose a new AI idea, use case, or capability (no technical knowledge required)
title: "[IDEA] <short description>"
labels: idea:submitted
assignees: ''
---

## Idea Title

<!-- A concise name for your idea (will become the asset `title`) -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this idea solve? Who is the target user? How often does this pain occur? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution in plain language. No technical knowledge required.
     If you know the asset type it would become, mention it:
     (prompt / skill / agent / workflow / automation) -->

## Work Stream

<!-- Which work stream(s) does this relate to?
     architects / capacity-management / developers / performance-engineers / sre / system-designers / testers / shared -->

## Expected Benefits

<!-- What would a successful implementation deliver? List 2–3 observable outcomes. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How will we know this idea is successfully implemented?
     List 2–3 specific, measurable criteria. -->

## LLM / Tool Compatibility (optional)

<!-- Which LLM(s) or tools do you expect this to work with? Leave blank if unsure. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links, references, prior art, or related assets in this repo -->

---

> **What happens next?**
> A maintainer will add the `idea:under-review` label within 5 business days.
> If approved (`idea:approved`), an engineer will convert this to a Markdown asset via PR.
> See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full vetting flow.
